text: The air here is tinged with anticipation and curiosity. I am in a space devoted to research and development, a liminal zone where ideas are incubated and the future is shaped. The colors and lights, the text and technology on display, all contribute to a sense of intellectual energy. I feel both small and energized, as if on the threshold of discovery, invited to consider not only how humans and machines coexist but also my own role within this evolving relationship. My mind is alert and quietly hopeful—here, knowledge feels alive, electric, and full of possibility.
